title: SUMERSHA 2pcs Silicone Spatulas Heat Resistant Jar Spatulas Cake Cream Butter Spatulas with Long Handle Non-Stick Kitchen Baking Cooking Resin Craft Stirring Mixing Scraper Tool (Red, Black)
description:
About this item
SILICONE SPATULAS: These spatulas are made of food grade silicone, good stability, no odor, high temperature resistance(-50℃-250℃) and durable for long time. Suitable for all kinds of ovens, refrigerators, microwave ovens, etc.
ERGONOMIC JAR SPATULAS WITH LONG HANDLE: The silicone material is comfortable and soft, do not hurt your hand. The length is reasonable, comfortable to use, and it is not easy to fatigue. Suitable for applying butter, cosmetics, sauces, resins, and more.
WIDE APPLIED SPATULAS: Our colorful silicone spatulas are widely used for baking, stir the cream, chocolate, butter, flour, etc. Beating cream and eggs, use our scraper to smooth the surface of the cake, make the cake more beautiful. Suitable for kinds of jars and blenders. Practical tool for professional confectioner and baking lovers.
EASY TO CLEAN AND STORAGE: These baking scrapers adopt integrated one-piece manufacturing process, not easy to fall off, no gap to contain dirt. Spatulas are non-stick and easy to clean. There is a hole design, great for hang dry and easy storage.
WHAT YOU GET: Package include 2 pieces of silicone spatulas in 2 colors, one red and one black. You can choose different colors for different uses. Multifunctional jar spatulas have different thicknesses on both sides, used in various appliances. They are great gift for wife, family and friends.
reviews_5s:
I use these to stir my cement in small containers and they have had held up well. They are firm and that is what I was looking for.We needed something to retrieve the last bit of mustard from the small jars of Colman's English Mustard. These do the job perfectly.I have spreader knives but was looking for something I could use to get the last out of jars and also to spread and these fit the bill. The colors/style are as pictured in the listing, if not perhaps a little more see-through, but they are very sturdy. I toss them into the dishwasher and they've come out perfectly so far. There is a hard metal "skeleton" inside that keeps these from bending outside of the silicone edges on the blade part. I found they worked beautifully both for scraping the sides/bottoms of mostly empty jars as well as frosting or icing cupcakes, cakes, bars, and buns. Outside of a few runs in the dishwasher I can't say how they'll hold up over a long period but so far I'm happy with them.
Overall these are really nice silicone spatulas, especially for the cost.

EDIT: It's been almost 6 months and we still love these things. Besides what I listed above, I use them a ton for mixing mac & cheese. First world problems for sure, but it drives me nuts when I use a spoon and the cheese powder sticks like glue to the inside of the spoon. I have regular spatulas that I used to use but, because these are so thin, even less sticks to them, and they tend not to break up the shaped pastas as much, either. Love these!These are decently thick, sturdy little spatulas. They're long enough to dig in and scrape out the sides of your jars and feel like they'll last.
